# Dependencies

## External Dependencies

T-Stack has **zero runtime dependencies**. The CLI package and all scripts use only Node.js built-in modules.

### Node.js Built-in Modules Used

| Module | Used By | Purpose |
|:---|:---|:---|
| node:fs | init.mjs, update.mjs, manifest.mjs, generate-version.mjs, pre-flight.mjs | File system operations |
| node:path | init.mjs, update.mjs, manifest.mjs, generate-version.mjs, pre-flight.mjs | Path manipulation |
| node:url | init.mjs, update.mjs, manifest.mjs, generate-version.mjs, pre-flight.mjs | fileURLToPath for ESM __dirname |
| node:module | cli.mjs | createRequire for reading package.json |
| node:crypto | update.mjs, generate-version.mjs | SHA-256 hash computation |

### CI/CD Action Dependencies

| Action | Version | Pinned Hash | Used In |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| actions/checkout | v4.2.2 | 11bd719... | release.yml, publish-cli.yml |
| actions/setup-node | v4.4.0 | 4993360... | publish-cli.yml |
| softprops/action-gh-release | v2.6.1 | 153bb8e... | release.yml |

All actions are pinned to full commit SHAs for supply chain security.

### Runtime Requirements

| Requirement | Version | Purpose |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Node.js | >= 18 | CLI execution (engines field in package.json) |
| VS Code | >= 1.109 | Agent mode support (.agent.md files) |
| GitHub Copilot | Latest | AI agent execution |
| Git | Any | Worktree support, version control |
| GitHub CLI (gh) | Optional | GitOps agent PR/issue operations |

## Internal Module Graph

### CLI Package (packages/cli/)
```
cli.mjs
  -> init.mjs -> manifest.mjs
  -> update.mjs -> manifest.mjs

manifest.mjs
  -> reads files/.tstack/version.json (payload)
```

### Scripts (scripts/)
```
generate-version.mjs (standalone - reads src/, writes src/.tstack/version.json)
pre-flight.mjs (standalone - reads .tstack/version.json + .tstack/.migrated)
sync-to-root.ps1 (standalone - copies src/ -> root)
sync-to-src.ps1 (standalone - copies root -> src/)
hooks/pre-commit -> generate-version.mjs
```

### Agent Dependency Graph
```
Orchestrator -> [Scout, Architect, Developer, Tester, Senior Engineer,
                 Security Auditor, Code Health, DevOps, GitOps, Scribe, Ask]
Architect -> [Scout]
All agents -> .tstack/ (blackboard reads/writes)
```

### Framework File Discovery (generate-version.mjs)
The manifest generator discovers framework files by convention:
- .github/agents/*.agent.md
- .github/skills/*/SKILL.md
- .github/hooks/*.json
- .tstack/.version, .tstack/README.md, .tstack/team.md
- .tstack/migrations/*/migration.md
- .tstack/sprints/README.md (initOnly)
- scripts/pre-flight.mjs

## Deprecation Status

No deprecated dependencies. The project maintains a zero-dependency philosophy. All CI actions are pinned to recent versions with full commit hash pinning.

## npm Package Metadata

- Name: @tstack/cli
- Version: 0.6.0
- License: MIT
- Registry: https://registry.npmjs.org
- Repository: github.com/joshfinnie/t-stack (packages/cli directory)
